update_text: Reinforces CALL-008: owner matrix still needs named accountable groups for two regions, but customer sentiment remains constructive if packet arrives as one clean package.
Missing context: procurement asked that the two-payment schedule be shown as an option, not as an approved commitment, to avoid finance confusion.
Reinforces proof closeout: reporting export retest is the last technical yellow item before operations will support expansion.
Adds context: plant supervisors prefer a one-page operator runbook plus a supervisor appendix; long architecture docs reduce adoption.
Ambiguity/conflict: procurement asked for aggressive discount modeling, but Deal Desk has not approved any large concession and wants it labeled internal-only.
Adds context: legal is comfortable with process language after review, but not with customer-facing concession wording or restricted workflow details.
